programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Dumfries and Galloway. Hair salon owner and self-confessed Disney princess Charlene Fry-Henderson serves up some locally reared meat and bizarre cow-milking entertainment. (Ep1/5) [AD,S]

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Dumfries and Galloway. Horse-mad banker Olive Melville wants to show her guests how to host a 'proper' dinner party. But how will her risky crab starter go down? (Ep2/5) [AD,S]

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Dumfries and Galloway. Can local radio DJ and funnyman Tommy Jardine impress his guests with his charisma, surprise Scottish main and a sheep auction? (Ep3/5) [AD,S]

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Dumfries and Galloway. Trainee teacher and DJ Josh Jones aims to broaden his guests' palates, with lamb pasanda and tandoori monkfish. But Tommy doesn't like spice or fish... (Ep4/5) [AD,S]

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Dumfries and Galloway. On the final night, Tammy Rice hopes that her no-nonsense approach, traditional Scottish fare and a side order of straight-talking will bag her the prize. (Ep5/5) [AD,S]

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The first visit is to Alston House in Cumbria, where Michael and Carole Allchorne are brimming with confidence. But things get hairy for one guest and the hosts are left reeling. [S]

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The second visit is to Scotia House in Harrogate, where host Marie suspects some of her guests are seeking revenge... Can she impress with deluxe teddy bears and a Northern Soul dance-off? [S]

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Yvonne welcomes her rivals to The Canberra Guest House in Blackpool, where relationships are strained and cracks start to show. And one of her guests ruffles more than just feathers. [S]

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The last visit is to The Crown & Kitchen in East Linton, where tensions are close to breaking point. Yvonne and Gail leave no mattress unturned as they go into super-sleuth mode. [S]

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: It's the final day of the competition and tensions run high with allegations of tit-for-tat scoring and a barrage of criticism, before the payments are revealed and the winner is announced. [S]

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: In Glasgow, Kirstie helps Laura and Euan, who've moved back from Sydney, to find a place that feels like home. And Phil shows Miriam and David everything from pristine to project. (S37 Ep5) [S]

programme.title: Kirstie and Phil's Love It or...
programme.desc: ...List It: In Caterham, Ruth and Ken are torn over their townhouse. Can Phil's open-plan options and all-important garage pip Kirstie's persuasive plan to the garden post? (S9 Ep3) [AD,S]

programme.title: Kevin McCloud's Listed Britain
programme.desc: Kevin raises Tower Bridge and descends into its Victorian engine rooms, marvels at the colourful Cosmic House, and tries out the antique stage machinery in one of the world's oldest working theatres

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Leon's been in a head-on collision with a car. Graham's sustained a rugby injury and has lost feeling in his limbs. Elliott, who's four, has a foreign object stuck up his nose. (S14 Ep6/9) [AD,S]

programme.desc: Max McMurdo upcycles a brass propeller into a stylish table lamp, while Henry Cole goes all Victorian with an old pond yacht. (S2 Ep10/25) [AD,S]

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Near the Malvern Hills, Henry Cole converts two saddles into bar stools, while Simon O'Brien makes a profit on a 1960s kitchen cupboard. (S2 Ep24/25) [AD,S]

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: No-nonsense bikers Wayne and Tracy Dunn host first, at Llwyn Onn Guest House in Betws-y-Coed, north Wales, where they challenge their guests to design their own bike leathers. [S]

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Newly-weds Jon and Chelli Bean host at the pooch-friendly Parkwood Hotel in Stockton-on-Tees. But after a noisy night and some tough scores, can they come out as top dog of the competition? [S]

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Nicola and Mackenzie hope to dazzle their guests with their super-stylish rooms at The Pug & Greyhound in Great Glen, Leicestershire. But one couple make some dusty discoveries. [S]

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The final visit is to The Solar Strand Hotel in Crosskeys, Wales, where former IT consultant Gary Pesticcio and his daughter Naomi hope that their high-tech B&B will power them to victory. [S]

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: It's the final day of the competition and the B&Bers meet for the last time. The atmosphere turns sour and there's tough talk, before the winner is announced. [S]

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: South London. Divorce lawyer Michelle Camacho takes her guests back to the 1970s with a retro menu of duck a l'orange, psychedelic coleslaw, groovy veg and a Bloody Mary sorbet. (Ep1/5) [AD,S]

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: South London. Pub manager and artist Matt Wren struggles with disasters in the kitchen. Meanwhile, two of his guests get into an argument and the other pair make eyes at each other! (Ep2/5) [AD,S]

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: South London. Print manager and live wire Licia Snow plans a laid-back evening with a few rustic and homely touches. But can she resist the urge to bicker with Michelle? (Ep3/5) [AD,S]

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: South London. Trainee solicitor Raphael Steele hosts his first-ever dinner party with an ambitious Caribbean menu of ackee, saltfish and curried goat, and steelpan entertainment. (Ep4/5) [AD,S]

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: South London. Swedish businesswoman Charlotte Sundberg hosts the final night. Can an evening of schnapps, folk singing and classic Swedish cuisine win her the prize? (Ep5/5) [AD,S]

programme.title: Four in a Bed

programme.title: Four in a Bed

programme.title: Four in a Bed

programme.title: Four in a Bed

programme.title: Four in a Bed

programme.title: Kirstie and Phil's Love It or...

programme.title: Great British Train Journeys...
programme.desc: ...from Above: All aboard for 200 years of British train travel and the most spectacular journeys in Britain, starting with the Scottish Highlands and the real Hogwarts Express. (Ep1/4) [AD,S]

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Zach, who's 25, has severed four of his fingers in a building site accident. Daquon, who's 10, was hit by a motorbike on his way to school and has a badly broken arm. (S14 Ep8/9) [AD,S]

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E

programme.desc: Set in an alternate universe where Dylan died and Gaheris Rhade is trying to reform the Commonwealth.

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: The group that attacked the Andromeda during the first Commonwealth charter signing returns to wreak havoc.

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: Trance runs through a number of different scenarios, trying to find one in which her crewmates don't die.

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: A "more powerful" Andromeda ship explodes due to likely sabotage, forcing Dylan's crew to save them.

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: Beka endangers both her crew and an entire planet when a former love shows up.

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.sub-title: What Happens to a Rev Deferred?
programme.desc: The Andromeda receives a cry for help from Rev Bam.

programme.title: Haven
programme.desc: A string of kidnappings have caused panic, and the kids must be found before they fall victim to the elements.

programme.title: Haven
programme.desc: Some very unusual cases of suicide lead the team to believe there is a possession trouble afoot.

programme.title: Haven
programme.desc: Knowing the moment of your death isn't as thrilling as one might think, as some residents are soon to learn.

programme.title: Haven
programme.desc: When a dream trouble goes viral, Haven's finest can't be caught sleeping or they may pay the ultimate price.

programme.title: The Dead Zone
programme.desc: Johnny must discover why his reunion with a former student triggers visions of Stillson and future Armageddon.

programme.title: The Dead Zone
programme.desc: A string of nightmares prompts Johnny to dig into his father's past to prevent a present day catastrophe.

programme.title: The Dead Zone
programme.desc: When Sarah's father moves into a retirement home, Johnny begins having visions about the fate of its residents

programme.title: Sanctuary
programme.desc: Something is happening to Will, and it's up to the rest of the team to figure out what and how to stop it.

programme.title: Sanctuary
programme.desc: Will and Henry have dates, but fate (and a lepidoptera hominid) has other plans.

programme.title: Sanctuary
programme.desc: Helen and Nikola explore an ancient Praxian stronghold, and find a little more than they were expecting.

programme.title: The Dead Zone
programme.desc: Johnny is shaken by his Armagedon visions and grows obsessed with Stillson whom he's secretly investigating.

programme.title: The Dead Zone
programme.desc: Johnny struggles to rescue four teens trapped in a collapsing mine, all the while reliving sins from his past.

programme.title: The Dead Zone
programme.desc: In the continuation of the last episode, an unexpected incident leads Johnny to a new understanding of Walt.

programme.title: The Dead Zone
programme.desc: Johnny takes on a major corporation to prevent the marketing of a drug he foresees will cause birth defects.

programme.title: Haven
programme.desc: Duke decides to leave Haven in the aftermath of dealing with Wade.

programme.title: Haven
programme.desc: When Dwight is kidnapped, Audrey is shocked to discover that the mysterious thugs from the are barn behind it.

programme.title: Haven
programme.desc: Audrey awakes in a trouble-free Haven to discover that no one remembers her--save for William.

programme.title: Haven
programme.desc: A heart-eating monster from folklore attracts a paranormal investigating duo, the Darkside Seekers, to Haven.

programme.title: Mutant X
programme.desc: Brennan and the team work with a time traveling mutant to diffuse a bomb threatening devastating consequences.

programme.title: Mutant X
programme.desc: While Brennan and Shalimar investigate a mysterious plane crash, Lexa contemplates her future with the team.

programme.title: Mutant X
programme.desc: As the team fights to retrieve a formula hidden in artwork, Shalimar is given info from a mysterious source.

programme.title: Mutant X
programme.desc: Mutant X tracks down a rogue scientist while Shalimar breaks away to help Adam save the scientist.

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: Beka endangers both her crew and an entire planet when a former love shows up.

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.sub-title: What Happens to a Rev Deferred?
programme.desc: The Andromeda receives a cry for help from Rev Bam.

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: After a Commonwealth planet is attacked by Pyrian pyroformers, Dylan is forced to fight to protect the planet.

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: Dylan hears voices calling him to a planet of "fire and ice," and must cross Nietzschean-controlled space.

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: In a battle between Nietzschean prides, the crew captures a hostile who may have a map of the slipstream.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: A man from another world crash lands on Earth during the age of the Vikings.

programme.title: Northmen: A Viking Saga
programme.desc: A crew of Viking raiders must cut through harsh, unknown territory to reach the safety of a Viking stronghold.

programme.title: A Viking Saga: The Darkest Day
programme.desc: A novice monk must deliver a Holy Gospel to the Iona monastery, while being pursued by a Viking death squad.

programme.title: Viking Destiny
programme.desc: A Viking princess travels the world gaining wisdom and building the army she needs to win back her throne.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: A man from another world crash lands on Earth during the age of the Vikings.

programme.title: The Dead Zone
programme.desc: When Johnny is infused with blood from six different people, he begins having visions through the donors eyes.

programme.title: The Dead Zone
programme.desc: Johhny's decision to join the campaign of Stillson's opponent, Harrison Fisher has unintended consequences.

programme.title: The Dead Zone
programme.desc: Johnny is kidnapped by three young women who demand his help in solving a murder mystery from the past.

programme.title: The Dead Zone
programme.desc: On a flight to Washington, Johnny has a vision of their plane crashing and must convince the pilot to land.

programme.title: Haven
programme.desc: Haven's troubles turn more deadly when William activates a trouble in a baby: with every cry, someone dies.

programme.title: Haven
programme.desc: As attempts are made to stop William, things only get worse.

programme.title: Haven
programme.desc: Nathan and Duke discover that Audrey's body has been hijacked by Mara.

programme.title: Haven
programme.desc: Dwight tries to keep Haven together as the chief of police and Mara creates new troubles.

programme.title: Mutant X
programme.desc: Mutant X discovers Brennan's old partner is involved in stealing secrets from the Dominion.

programme.title: Mutant X
programme.desc: Mutant X unearths an experiment of age-reversal serum and Jesse's grandfather is a one of the test subjects.

programme.title: Mutant X
programme.desc: Lexa is the subject of a covert experiment that is controlling her. The team hunts for the doctor responsible.

programme.title: Mutant X
programme.desc: Brennan must connect with Jesse and lead him through past memories they’ve shared in order to save his life.

programme.title: Occupation
programme.desc: A small group of town residents have to band together after a devastating ground invasion.

programme.title: The Edge of Seventeen
programme.desc: Everyone knows that growing up is hard, and life is no easier for high school junior Nadine (Hailee Steinfeld), who is already at peak awkwardness when her all-star older brother Darian (Blake Jenner) starts dating her best friend Krista (Haley Lu Richardson). All at once, Nadine feels more alone than ever, until an unexpected friendship with a thoughtful teen (Hayden Szeto) gives her a glimmer of hope that things just might not be so terrible after all.

programme.title: True Grit
programme.desc: After an outlaw named Tom Chaney murders her father, feisty 14-year-old farm girl Mattie Ross hires Rooster Cogburn, a boozy, trigger-happy lawman, to help her find Chaney and avenge her father. The bickering duo are not alone in their quest, for a Texas Ranger named LaBoeuf is also tracking Chaney for reasons of his own. Together the unlikely trio ventures into hostile territory to dispense some Old West justice.

programme.title: Enemy at the Gates
programme.desc: Vassili is a young Russian sharpshooter who becomes a legend when a savvy political officer makes him the hero of his propaganda campaign. Their friendship is threatened when both men fall in love with a beautiful female soldier. As the battle for the city rages, Vassili faces the ultimate challenge when the Nazi command dispatches its most elite marksman to hunt down and kill the man who has become the hope of all Russia.

programme.title: Uncommon Valor
programme.desc: Col. Cal Rhodes (Gene Hackman), a retired Marine officer, holds out hope that his son, believed to be a prisoner of war in Laos, is still alive. Despite the government's refusal to help Rhodes, he assembles a group to find and rescue his son, including skilled soldiers such as Wilkes (Fred Ward) and Sailor (Randall "Tex" Cobb). Funded by MacGregor (Robert Stack), a wealthy executive also looking for his son, Rhodes leads his men on a dangerous mission into the jungles of Laos.

programme.title: Frank Miller's Sin City: A Dame to Kill For
programme.desc: The damaged denizens of Sin City return for another round of stories from the mind of Frank Miller. In "Just Another Saturday Night," Marv (Mickey Rourke) struggles to recall a nasty run-in with some frat boys. In "A Dame to Kill For," Dwight McCarthy (Josh Brolin) forsakes his battle with his inner demons to help Ava Lord (Eva Green), the woman of his dreams and nightmares. In "Nancy's Last Dance," Nancy Callahan (Jessica Alba), mad with grief and rage over Hartigan's death, vows revenge.

programme.title: JFK Revisited: Through the Looking Glass
programme.desc: Filmmaker Oliver Stone examines the circumstances surrounding the assassination of President John F. Kennedy on Nov. 22, 1963, in Dallas.

programme.title: Mob Town
programme.desc: The FBI and a local cop track various members of organized crime families as they gather for a huge meeting in upstate New York in 1957.

programme.title: Day of the Fight
programme.desc: On the day of his first fight since his release from prison, a former boxing champion reconnects with his trainer, ex-wife, childhood friend, and abusive father in a quest for forgiveness and closure.

programme.title: Titanic
programme.desc: Two young lovers from different backgrounds meet and fall in love on the ill-fated maiden voyage of the unsinkable R.M.S. Titanic.

programme.title: Old Henry
programme.desc: A quiet man and his son take in a wounded stranger near his homestead, along with a bag full of cash. The stranger claims he's a sheriff being pursued by outlaws, but the man can't be sure.

programme.title: Terminator 2: Judgment Day
programme.desc: In this sequel set eleven years after "The Terminator," young John Connor (Edward Furlong), the key to civilization's victory over a future robot uprising, is the target of the shape-shifting T-1000 (Robert Patrick), a Terminator sent from the future to kill him. Another Terminator, the revamped T-800 (Arnold Schwarzenegger), has been sent back to protect the boy. As John and his mother (Linda Hamilton) go on the run with the T-800, the boy forms an unexpected bond with the robot.

programme.title: Day of the Fight
programme.desc: On the day of his first fight since his release from prison, a former boxing champion reconnects with his trainer, ex-wife, childhood friend, and abusive father in a quest for forgiveness and closure.

programme.title: Million Dollar Baby
programme.desc: Frankie Dunn (Clint Eastwood) is a veteran Los Angeles boxing trainer who keeps almost everyone at arm's length, except his old friend and associate Eddie "Scrap Iron" Dupree (Morgan Freeman). When Maggie Fitzgerald (Hilary Swank) arrives in Frankie's gym seeking his expertise, he is reluctant to train the young woman, a transplant from working-class Missouri. Eventually, he relents, and the two form a close bond that will irrevocably change them both.

programme.title: Gladiator
programme.desc: Commodus (Joaquin Phoenix) takes power and strips rank from Maximus (Russell Crowe), one of the favored generals of his predecessor and father, Emperor Marcus Aurelius, the great stoical philosopher. Maximus is then relegated to fighting to the death in the gladiator arenas.

programme.title: Run
programme.desc: Smugglers, the police, locals and tourists get drawn into a dangerous web of survival, sacrifice and shifting loyalties as Europe faces a surge in migration.

programme.title: A Bad Moms Christmas
programme.desc: Under-appreciated and overburdened moms Amy, Kiki and Carla rebel against the challenges and expectations of the Super Bowl for moms: Christmas. As if creating the perfect holiday for their families isn't hard enough, they'll have to do it while hosting and entertaining their own respective mothers when they come to visit.

programme.title: Scary Movie 4
programme.desc: Dim-witted Cindy Campbell (Anna Faris) and her sex-crazed friend, Brenda (Regina Hall), team up with cute-but-clueless Tom Ryan (Craig Bierko) to save the world from a hostile alien invasion, with hints of War of the Worlds, Saw II, Million Dollar Baby and The Village. Celebrity cameos include Carmen Electra, Shaquille O'Neal, Dr. Phil McGraw, Bill Pullman, Molly Shannon and Michael Madsen.

programme.title: Scary Movie V
programme.desc: Much bizarre activity follows after a husband and wife bring their newborn infant home from the hospital. When they realize that a demon is stalking their family, they consult paranormal specialists and install numerous cameras to drive out the pesky spirit. Movies that are spoofed in the familiar format include the "Paranormal Activity" franchise, "Mama," "Sinister," "Evil Dead," "Inception," "Black Swan" and "Rise of the Planet of the Apes.".

programme.title: Snag
programme.desc: A lone wolf's quiet existence gets shattered when he learns that the woman he once loved and thought was dead is alive and being held captive by ruthless gangsters. Now, to take on this dangerous criminal organization, he must seek out allies and storm into a world of violence to rescue the love of his life.

programme.title: The Friend
programme.desc: New York City writer Iris finds her comfortable, solitary life thrown into disarray after her closest friend and mentor bequeaths her a Great Dane named Apollo. The huge dog immediately creates practical problems for Iris, from furniture destruction to eviction notices, as well as more existential ones. Yet as Iris finds herself unexpectedly bonding with Apollo, she begins to come to terms with her past, and her own creative inner life.

programme.title: A Mighty Heart
programme.desc: Mariane Pearl (Angelina Jolie), the wife of journalist Daniel Pearl (Dan Futterman) of The Wall Street Journal, heads to Pakistan after terrorists capture her husband. In the terrifying weeks that follow, she must cope with international attention and find her way through the dangerous world of underground politics in a desperate effort to find him.

programme.title: Molly's Game
programme.desc: The true story of Molly Bloom, a beautiful, young, Olympic-class skier who ran the world's most exclusive high-stakes poker game for a decade before being arrested in the middle of the night by 17 FBI agents wielding automatic weapons. Her players included Hollywood royalty, sports stars, business titans and finally, unbeknown to her, the Russian mob. Her only ally was her criminal defense lawyer Charlie Jaffey, who learned there was much more to Molly than the tabloids led people to believe.

programme.title: Not Without Hope
programme.desc: Four friends face disaster when their boat capsizes in the Gulf of Mexico. Battling massive waves, sharks, dehydration and hypothermia, they cling to hope as Capt. Timothy Close and his Coast Guard crew launch a daring rescue through a raging storm to save them.

programme.title: Gasoline Alley
programme.desc: Set in the underbelly of Los Angeles, a man is drawn into a high-profile triple murder. The two police detectives on his tail soon join him in attempting to uncover an explosive conspiracy.

programme.title: Saving Private Ryan
programme.desc: Captain John Miller (Tom Hanks) takes his men behind enemy lines to find Private James Ryan, whose three brothers have been killed in combat. Surrounded by the brutal realties of war, while searching for Ryan, each man embarks upon a personal journey and discovers their own strength to triumph over an uncertain future with honor, decency and courage.

programme.title: Memories of Murder
programme.desc: In 1986, Park (Song Kang-ho) and Cho (Kim Roi-ha) were two simple-minded detectives assigned to a double murder investigation in a South Korean province. But when the murderer strikes several more times with the same pattern, the detectives realize that they are chasing the country's first documented serial killer. Relying on only their basic skills and tools, Park and Cho attempt to piece together the clues and solve the case in this thriller based on true events.

programme.title: There Will Be Blood
programme.desc: Silver miner Daniel Plainview (Daniel Day-Lewis) leads a hardscrabble life with his son, H.W. (Dillon Freasier). When he hears about oil oozing from the ground near the Western town of Little Boston, Daniel takes his son on a mission to find their fortune. Daniel makes his lucky strike and becomes a self-made tycoon but, as his fortune grows, he deviates into moral bankruptcy.

programme.title: Slingshot
programme.desc: An astronaut struggles to maintain his grip on reality during a possibly compromised mission to Saturn's moon, Titan.

programme.title: Dreamer: Inspired by a True Story
programme.desc: Ben Crane (Kurt Russell) is a horse trainer who is struggling to connect with his precocious daughter, Cale (Dakota Fanning). But then a horse by the name of Soñador suffers a broken leg after its evil owner (David Morse) races her despite Ben's advice. Rather than put his client's injured horse down, Ben adopts her and welcomes Cale into the family business. They train Soñador to race again as grouchy but kind-hearted Grandpa (Kris Kristofferson) lends his encouragement.

programme.title: World Trade Center
programme.desc: Two Port Authority officers, Sgt. John McLoughlin (Nicolas Cage) and Officer Will Jimeno (Michael Peña), become trapped in the rubble of the World Trade Center after going in to help people escape from the buildings during the terrorist attacks of Sept. 11, 2001.

programme.title: Grudge Match
programme.desc: Pittsburgh boxers Billy "The Kid" McDonnen (Robert De Niro) and Henry "Razor" Sharp (Sylvester Stallone) shared a fierce rivalry back in the 1980s. Each had scored a victory in two matches, but on the eve of their decisive third bout, Henry suddenly announced his retirement, effectively ending both boxers' careers. Thirty years later, boxing promoter Dante Slate Jr. (Kevin Hart) makes Billy and Henry an offer they can't refuse: Return to the ring and settle the score once and for all.

programme.title: Indiana Jones and the Raiders of the Lost Ark
programme.desc: Dr. Indiana Jones, a renowned archeologist and expert in the occult, is hired by the U.S. Government to find the ark of the covenant, which is believed to still hold the Ten Commandments. Unfortunately, Hitler's agents are also after the ark. Indy and his ex-flame Marion escape from various close scrapes in a quest that takes them from Nepal to Cairo.

programme.title: Indiana Jones and the Temple of Doom
programme.desc: The second of the Lucas/Spielberg Indiana Jones epics is set a year or so before the events in Raiders of the Lost Ark. Indy needs to retrieve a precious gem and several kidnapped young boys on behalf of a remote East Indian village. This time he teams up with a night club singer and a 12-year old boy.

programme.title: Holes
programme.desc: A boy and his friends question the motives of a woman (Sigourney Weaver) who forces them to dig holes at a detention camp.

programme.title: Harold & Kumar Go to White Castle
programme.desc: Nerdy accountant Harold (John Cho) and his irrepressible friend, Kumar (Kal Penn), get stoned watching television and find themselves utterly bewitched by a commercial for White Castle. Convinced there must be one nearby, the two set out on a late-night odyssey that takes them deep into New Jersey. Somehow, the boys manage to run afoul of rednecks, cops and even a car-stealing Neil Patrick Harris before getting anywhere near their beloved sliders.

programme.title: Failure to Launch
programme.desc: A young man (Matthew McConaughey) continues to live at the home of parents who, in desperation to push him out of the nest once and for all, hatch a plan. They hire a beautiful woman (Sarah Jessica Parker) to entice him to assume the mantle of responsibility and get his own place.

programme.title: BOOM BOX
बूम बॉक्स
பூம் பாக்ஸ்
బూమ్ బాక్స్
बूम बॉक्स
programme.desc: A comprehensive collection of the most popular Bollywood dance tracks and top club hits play back to back.
विभिन्न कलाकारों द्वारा रचित पैर थिरकाने वाले प्रसिद्ध नृत्य गीतों का व्यापक संकलन प्रस्तुत किया जाता है।
వివిధ కళాకారులు స్వరపరిచిన, ఉత్సాహాన్ని కలిగించే అనేక ప్రసిద్ధ నృత్య గీతాల సమగ్ర సంకలనాన్ని ప్రసారం చేస్తారు.

programme.title: Punjabi Beats
पंजाबी बीट्स
पंजाबी बीट्स
programme.desc: A comprehensive compilation of some of the most popular Punjabi songs composed by notable composers in the country.
प्रसिद्ध संगीतकारांनी संगीतबद्ध केलेल्या सर्वात लोकप्रिय पंजाबी गाण्यांचे एक संकलन एका मागोमाग एक पहा.

programme.title: Laavaan Phere
लावाँ फ़ेरे
லாவான் ஃபேரே
లావ‌ణ్ ఫేరే
लावाण फेरे
programme.desc: A young man is unable to marry the love of his life because of complications created by his pompous brothers-in-law-to-be.
एक युवक को एक युवती से प्यार होता है और उससे शादी करने का फैसला करता है। हालाँकि, युवक के जीजा और युवती के चिड़चिड़े स्वभाव वाले पिता हालात को जटिल बनाते हैं।
ప్రేమించిన అమ్మాయిని పెళ్లి చేసుకోవాల‌ని ఓ యువ‌కుడు అనుకుంటాడు. కానీ అత‌ని బావ‌, ఆమె తండ్రి వ‌ల్ల స‌మ‌స్య‌లు వ‌స్తాయి.
एक तरुण प्रेमात पडलेल्या तरुणीशी लग्न करण्याचा निर्णय घेतो पण त्याचा मेहुणा व मुलीचे रागीट वडील अडचणी निर्माण करतात.
